isolation.surface: pytest CLI / direct Python import checks

commands.name: direct-schema-graph-check
commands.command:
/Users/tmsincomb/miniforge3/envs/quantdb/bin/python3 - <<'PY'
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, event
from quantdb.generic_ingest import SchemaGraph
from quantdb.models import reflect_models
from quantdb.utils import dbUri

engine = create_engine(dbUri('quantdb-test-user', 'localhost', 5432, 'quantdb_test'))

@event.listens_for(engine, 'connect')
def _set_search_path(dbapi_connection, connection_record):
    cursor = dbapi_connection.cursor()
    cursor.execute('SET search_path TO quantdb, public')
    cursor.close()

models = reflect_models(engine=engine)
print(f"schema_graph_type={type(models.schema_graph).__name__}")
print(f"table_count={len(models.schema_graph.tables)}")
print(f"topo_order_count={len(models.schema_graph.topo_order)}")
print(f"has_objects_cycle={frozenset(['objects', 'objects_internal']) in models.schema_graph.circular_deps}")
models.engine.dispose()
PY

steps.action: Run SchemaGraph build tests in test/test_generic_ingest.py
steps.expected: SchemaGraph builds from ReflectedModels and exposes all 20 quantdb tables
steps.observed: pytest passed test_builds_without_errors, test_tables_dict_has_20_entries, and test_all_table_infos_are_correct_type

steps.action: Run explicit localhost direct import check
steps.expected: schema_graph field is a SchemaGraph instance with 20 tables
steps.observed: Direct check printed schema_graph_type=SchemaGraph and table_count=20

from sqlalchemy import create_engine, event
from quantdb.generic_ingest import SchemaGraph
from quantdb.models import reflect_models
from quantdb.utils import dbUri

engine = create_engine(dbUri('quantdb-test-user', 'localhost', 5432, 'quantdb_test'))

@event.listens_for(engine, 'connect')

assertions.title: Topological sort produces correct insert order

steps.expected: Root tables precede leaves and no table appears before its FK dependencies
steps.observed: pytest passed test_root_tables_before_leaf_tables, test_no_table_before_its_dependencies, test_topo_order_contains_all_tables, and test_topo_levels_are_non_negative

assertions.title: FK map covers all FK columns

steps.expected: Key tables and all single-column FK columns have FKInfo entries
steps.observed: pytest passed test_descriptors_quant_fk_map, test_values_quant_fk_map, test_fk_info_has_target_natural_key, test_fk_info_has_target_model, and test_every_fk_col_has_entry

assertions.title: Natural key detection finds correct unique constraints

steps.expected: Natural keys match the contract for label, addresses, and values_inst tables
steps.observed: pytest passed the parametrized label-key checks plus test_addresses_natural_key and test_values_inst_natural_key

steps.expected: SchemaGraph.circular_deps is non-empty and contains objects <-> objects_internal
steps.observed: pytest passed test_circular_deps_non_empty and test_objects_objects_internal_pair; direct check also printed has_objects_cycle=True

steps.expected: Lookup tables are flagged true and data tables false
steps.observed: pytest passed all lookup-table and data-table parametrized classification checks

steps.expected: All 5 association tables are present with correct composite PKs
steps.observed: pytest passed the five parametrized PK checks and test_all_five_association_tables

steps.expected: reflect_models returns a ReflectedModels object with non-null schema_graph of type SchemaGraph
steps.observed: pytest passed test_schema_graph_field_exists, test_schema_graph_is_correct_type, and test_schema_graph_not_none

steps.action: Run explicit localhost direct import check
steps.expected: Direct import shows schema_graph field is populated
steps.observed: Direct check printed schema_graph_type=SchemaGraph, table_count=20, and topo_order_count=20
